summary: Backend refactoring verification completed. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend landing page, login, dashboard, and admin panel all working correctly. Modular routers (admin.py, scheduler.py, utilities.py) are created but main endpoints still run from server.py.

minor.issue: Response fields differ between server.py (total_users, total_investments) and modular router admin.py (users_count, portfolios_count). Currently server.py version is active.

passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns {status: healthy}
POST /api/auth/login - returns session_token, user_id, role, account_number
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - returns 401
GET /api/admin/dashboard - returns total_users, total_investments, pending_kyc, pending_withdrawals, open_tickets
GET /api/admin/dashboard without auth - returns 401
GET /api/scheduler/status - returns running=true, jobs with profit_accrual_hourly
GET /api/scheduler/status without auth - returns 401
GET /api/exchange-rates - returns base, rates (161 currencies), updated_at
GET /api/exchange-rates?base=EUR - returns rates with EUR base
GET /api/portfolios - returns list of active portfolios
GET /api/portfolios/featured - returns max 3 featured portfolios
GET /api/portfolios/{id} - returns single portfolio details
GET /api/portfolios/invalid_id - returns 404
GET /api/admin/users - returns user list (admin only)
GET /api/admin/users without auth - returns 401
GET /api/admin/portfolios - returns all portfolios including inactive
GET /api/auth/me - returns user data with balances, tier, kyc_status
GET /api/user/transactions - returns transaction history
GET /api/investments - returns user investments list
Frontend landing page loads with portfolio stats ($127M, 18.4%, 2,847)
Frontend login page works with email/password authentication
Frontend dashboard shows user greeting, balances, income chart, 18 contracts
Frontend admin panel shows stats: 12 users, 32 investments, scheduler status
critical_code_review_comments: Modular routers created in /app/backend/routers/ (admin.py, scheduler.py, utilities.py) but main endpoints still run from server.py (3800+ lines)
Router __init__.py aggregates all routers but they are not yet replacing server.py endpoints
Admin dashboard response fields differ between server.py and modular router - needs alignment when migrating
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and portfolios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring in progress. Modular routers created in /app/backend/routers/ but main endpoints still run from server.py. All APIs working correctly. Admin user has 18 active contracts. Scheduler running with hourly profit accrual job. Exchange rates API returns 161 currencies from external API with fallback.

auth.GET /api/auth/me: WORKING - returns user data with balances

utilities.GET /api/exchange-rates: WORKING - returns 161 currencies from external API

frontend_pages.landing: WORKING - shows portfolio stats, CTA buttons
frontend_pages.dashboard: WORKING - shows balances, income chart, contracts
frontend_pages.admin_panel: WORKING - shows stats, scheduler status, navigation
